name: ToolDispatch
description: Tool framework receives a tool call and populates ctx.outputBudget
actions: Read tweaks.cfg tool_output_budget_default and per-tool override
Compute ctx.outputBudget = parsed override or min(round(C*0.3), 50_000)

name: ProduceNaturalOutput
description: Tool runs its read/exec/fetch and produces the would-be output string
actions: Estimate token count of natural output via estimateTokenCount

name: DecideBudgetVerdict
description: Compare natural-output token estimate against ctx.outputBudget

transitions.guard: estimate > budget AND tool is sliceable
estimate > budget AND tool refuses to slice (apply_patch)

name: PassThrough
description: Output fits; return verbatim, no hint appended

name: SliceOnSemanticBoundary
description: Cut on tool-natural unit (line/match/message/paragraph)
actions: Choose semantic unit per tool (read=line, grep=match, read_subsession=message, etc.)
Greedily accumulate units until token budget reached
Stop on last full unit that fits

name: FormatTruncationHint
description: Append plain-language hint with literal anchor token
actions: Compose exact arg adjustment text (offset=1500 / msgIdx_from=200 / narrow pattern)
Append [Truncated] anchor + fraction + adjustment as trailing 1-3 lines

name: RaiseToolError
description: Tool cannot produce a useful slice (e.g. apply_patch diff is atomic)
actions: Raise structured error with tool name, requested size, budget

name: ToolReturn
description: Tool result string forwarded to runtime; runloop appends to message stream

name: CompactionEntry
description: SessionCompaction.run({sessionID, observed, step}) called by runloop
actions: Bind KIND_CHAIN = [narrative, replay-tail, low-cost-server, llm-agent, chunked-digest]

name: PickNextKind
description: Walk to the next kind in KIND_CHAIN

name: AttemptKind
description: Invoke the kind's executor; for chunked-digest enter dedicated subgrafcet

transitions.guard: kind != chunked-digest AND executor returned summary

name: WriteAnchorFromKind
description: Append assistant message with summary===true holding the digest

name: VerifyAfterCompact
description: Re-estimate prompt size against per-request budget

name: FinaliseSuccess
description: Compaction succeeded and verified; runloop continues

name: EscalateToNextKind
description: Current kind failed verify-after-compact or structurally; advance

name: TerminalUnrecoverable
description: All kinds exhausted; raise structured error to runloop
actions: Include hint: an individual round exceeds digest per-chunk floor

name: ChunkedDigestStart
description: Enter chunked-digest path
actions: Identify system prompt and trailing unfinished round (excluded)
Identify closed rounds (user msg + assistant with all tool_calls resolved)

name: SplitIntoChunks
description: Group rounds into chunks of ~chunked_digest_chunk_target_tokens
actions: Walk rounds, accumulate until chunk ~= target tokens, emit chunk, repeat

name: DigestChunkLoop
description: For k = 1..N, request digest of chunk k under framing prompt

name: ValidateDigestResponse
description: Check response shape and absence of tool_calls

transitions.guard: response is valid JSON digest, no tool_calls

name: RetryWithStricterFraming
description: Re-issue chunk k with stricter framing prompt

name: MergeDigest
description: Merge digest_chunk_k into digest_so_far

name: FinaliseDigestAnchor
description: Write merged digest as Anchor; re-attach trailing unfinished round
actions: Append assistant message with summary===true holding merged digest
Re-append original triggering user request after Anchor

name: RaiseDigestToolCallError
description: Digesting LLM persistently emitted tool_calls despite framing

name: RaiseDigestTooLarge
description: Round set exceeds chunked_digest_max_chunks even at target chunk size
